description.value: Open bed platform for municipal, utility, and campus operations. Built on Fernhay eAV electric cutaway chassis. Chassis designed and manufactured by Fernhay.
Fernhay eAV electric cutaway chassis — designed and manufactured by Fernhay

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Fully electric cutaway chassis platform. Includes powertrain, battery pack, frame, suspension, steering, and braking systems. Designed and manufactured by Fernhay.
Open bed without top or side rails. Simplest configuration for general-purpose hauling.
Flat bed with removable side and rear rails/stakes for securing cargo. Standard configuration for versatile load handling.
Enclosed refuse collection body with rear loading mechanism. Designed for waste collection and municipal sanitation operations.
Enclosed service body with compartmented side storage, workbench top, and integrated tool organization. Ideal for utility and maintenance fleet operations.
Hydraulic dump bed for loose material transport. Ideal for construction, landscaping, and maintenance operations.
Standard white exterior finish. Included in base price.
Custom exterior color matched to customer specifications. Includes fleet branding color matching.

description.value: Select a charging solution for your vehicle

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Standard Level 2 AC charging unit for overnight depot charging. Ideal for fleet operations with predictable schedules.
DC fast charging unit enabling rapid charging at commercial depots. 80% charge in under 1 hour.
